raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find duplicate files by content. Use find + sha256sum + sort + uniq -d. Command: find /workspace -type f -print0 | xargs -0 sha256sum | sort | uniq -d -w 64 | cut -d' ' -f3-? Actually uniq -d prints duplicate lines. But need list paths. Use awk to collect. Simpler: find ... | xargs -0 sha256sum | sort | awk 'NR==1{prev=$1; files=$3} $1==prev{print files; print $3; next} {prev=$1; files=$3}'. But output duplicates only. Provide command.
